settings.title: Settings
settings.author: Author
settings.startup_desc: Controls what happens when Windows starts or the window closes.
settings.minimize_tray_desc: Minimize the app to the system tray instead of closing.
settings.appearance_desc: Customize the look and feel of the app.
settings.reset_desc: Restore all settings to their default values.
settings.reset_all_desc: Will reset all input fields and settings to the defaults.

toggles.enable_desc: Globally enable or disable smooth scrolling
toggles.enable_warning: Smooth scrolling simulates mouse input via WinAPI. It shouldn't affect games, but some anti-cheat systems may flag it. No issues reported so far.
toggles.auto_start_desc: Automatically start the application when you log in

params.scroll_multiplier_desc: Base multiplier that increases the distance of each scroll tick.
params.send_interval_desc: Interval between synthetic scroll events. Higher values produce smoother motion but add more input lag.
params.step_size_desc: Minimum scroll step per event. Controls how gradual the motion feels at low speeds.
params.max_send_step_desc: Maximum scroll step per event. Caps the highest speed achievable.
params.step_gain_desc: How quickly the step size grows as scroll input accumulates. Lower values feel more gradual.
params.max_accel_desc: Peak acceleration multiplier based on how long the wheel scrolls continuously.
params.accel_decay_time_desc: How quickly acceleration fades after scrolling stops, in milliseconds.
